metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.13-beta.17
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Fixes the ReaImGui Child-boundary assertion when collapsing the inline channel rail. - Avoids the stale same-frame cursor relocation and submits a defensive layout item. - Renames right-click multichannel behavior to waveform focus instead of audio Solo. - States clearly that multichannel audio follows REAPER's device routing.
